steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is C, $8$.

steps.title: Apply the zero product property
steps.content: Since $-5\ne 0$, the solutions come from setting each binomial factor of $-5(v-8)(v-2)(v+9)=0$ to zero, giving $v=8,\ 2,\ -9$.

steps.title: Match a choice
steps.content: Among the options $-5,\ -2,\ 8,\ 9$, only $v=8$ appears in the solution set. That is the correct answer.
